originalTitle: PufferLib - new pareto frontiers in RL
title: Implementing Multi-Cost Optimization in Protein for Pareto Frontiers
summary: Worked on modifying the protein hyperparameter sweep algorithm to optimize for both wall-clock time and sample steps, creating compute-data tradeoff frontiers. Debugged degenerate behavior where the algorithm exploited time caps, and improved the sweep to explore both sample-efficient and compute-efficient runs.
